landing.heroDesc: Track your games, log plays, lend to friends, and show off your library. GameTaverns gives your shelf a proper home online.
landing.heroSubDesc: Import from BoardGameGeek in seconds. Share your plays. Follow your friends.
landing.builtForDesc: Solo collector with 50 games? Group of friends sharing a shelf? Café running a public library? It all works.
landing.everythingDesc: BGG for data, a spreadsheet for lending, a group chat for game night — sound familiar? Put it in one place.
landing.howItWorksDesc: From signup to a fully cataloged library — faster than you'd expect.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up, pick a name and slug — your public library URL is ready instantly.
landing.step2Desc: Enter your BGG username and import your entire library with box art, descriptions and details in one go.
landing.step3Desc: Send your library link to friends, set up lending rules, and start playing.
landing.discoverDesc: Browse the Library Directory to find active game libraries in your area and see what's on their shelves.
landing.shareGrowDesc: Tools to spread the word and bring your gaming group on board.
landing.ctaTitle: Your Shelf Deserves Better Than a Spreadsheet
landing.ctaDesc: Create a free library and see how it feels to have your games actually organised.
landing.ctaFooter: Free forever for personal use. No credit card required.

tour.welcomeDesc: This is your dashboard — the command center for your board game library. Let's walk through the key features by visiting each one!
tour.createLibraryDesc: First, create a library. It gets its own subdomain (e.g., yourname.gametaverns.com) where friends can browse your games.
tour.importGamesDesc: Now let's add some games! Import from BoardGameGeek, a CSV file, or add games manually to build your library.
tour.customizeDesc: Make your library uniquely yours — set a logo, pick colors, and choose fonts in Library Settings.
tour.secureDesc: Protect your account with two-factor authentication. It only takes a minute with any authenticator app.
tour.completeDesc: Great job! You've got the basics covered. Explore community features like lending, events, polls, and forums whenever you're ready.

archetypes.title: Gaming Personality Archetypes
archetypes.intro: Your Gaming Personality is determined by analyzing the mechanics of every game in your collection and matching them against archetype trigger lists. The result is play-weighted — games you actually play count more than shelf decorations.
archetypes.step1: We scan every base game in your library and look up its mechanics from the catalog.
archetypes.step2: Each archetype has weighted trigger mechanics. Definitive triggers (⭐⭐⭐) score 3×, strong triggers (⭐⭐) score 2×, and standard triggers score 1×.
archetypes.step3: If an archetype requires a minimum collection weight (complexity), a 1.3× bonus is applied when your collection meets the threshold.
archetypes.step4: Play-log weighting: Games you've actually played get boosted (1 play = 2×, 10 plays = 3.5×). Unplayed games receive a 0.5× penalty.
archetypes.step5: The highest-scoring archetype becomes your primary personality. The runner-up appears as your secondary.
archetypes.shelfVsPlayIntro: Your Collection DNA shows three perspectives:
archetypes.shelfDesc: Based purely on what you own. Every game counts equally.
archetypes.playStyleDesc: Based only on games with logged sessions. Reflects what you actually enjoy.
archetypes.blendedDesc: The primary result. Played games boosted, unplayed games penalized. Best of both worlds.
archetypes.fallbackArchetype: Fallback archetype — assigned when no other archetype scores strongly.
archetypes.footerNote: Your personality updates automatically as you add games or log play sessions. Monthly snapshots track how your personality evolves over time.

cookies.whatAreCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.
cookies.howWeUseDesc: GameTaverns LLC uses a minimal set of cookies focused on essential functionality. We do not use cookies for advertising or third-party tracking.
cookies.ourCookiesCategories: Our cookies fall into these categories:
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the site to function (login, security)
cookies.thirdPartyCookiesDesc: We minimize third-party cookies. The following services may set their own cookies:
cookies.managingCookiesDesc: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking essential cookies will prevent you from logging in.
cookies.doNotTrackDesc: GameTaverns LLC respects "Do Not Track" browser signals. We do not track users across third-party websites.
cookies.contactUsDesc: If you have questions about our use of cookies:

gameForm.upcHint: The barcode number on the game box. Used for instant lookup when scanning at lending events.

gameForm.copiesOwnedHint: Track how many copies of this game you own. Used for lending inventory.
gameForm.comingSoonHint: Mark this game as purchased/backed but not yet received. It won't appear in the main catalog.
gameForm.forSaleHint: Mark this game as available for sale. It will appear in the marketplace section.
gameForm.locationNotesPlaceholder: e.g., In closet, Behind couch, etc.
gameForm.storageHint: Track where this game is stored and its component status.
gameForm.currentValueHint: Your estimated resale value — used for collection value tracking.
gameForm.purchasePrivateHint: Private purchase tracking - only visible to admins.
gameForm.videosHint: Add YouTube links to gameplay videos, reviews, or tutorials.
gameForm.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated data including play history, loans, and documents.
gameForm.gameDeletedDesc: "{{title}}" has been removed from your collection.
gameForm.deleteFailedDesc: Failed to delete the game. Please try again.
